name: V4_BigramHash_SWA_Int5MLP_SmearGate
author: DizSi
description: V4 rewrite based on thwu1's winning 1.1428 architecture. 10L GQA (8h/4kv) + 3xMLP + Learned BigramHashEmbedding(10240,128) + SmearGate + Mixed Int5-MLP/Int6-Attn quantization + Magnitude pruning (3%) + SWA(0.4) + zstd compression + Linear warmdown. Novel: Dual bigram (learned hash + post-hoc statistical table at eval) + compiled forward_logits + PyTorch 2.4 GQA fallback.
